ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who posted the tweet */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of retweets for the tweet */,
  "fav_count" INTEGER /* Number of favorites (likes) for the tweet */,
  "tweet_text" TEXT /* Text content of the tweet */,
  "tweet_date" TEXT /* Date the tweet was posted */,
  "tweet_time" TEXT /* Time the tweet was posted */,
  "sensitivity" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the tweet is sensitive */,
  "verified_user" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the user is verified */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "favorited" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the tweet has been favorited */,
  "retweeted" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the tweet has been retweeted */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the tweet */,
  "geo_location" TEXT /* Geolocation data (latitude and longitude) */,
  "source_device" TEXT /* Device or application used to post the tweet */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment analysis score of the tweet */,
  "keyword_extraction" TEXT /* List of extracted keywords from the tweet */,
  "has_media" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the tweet contains media */,
  "media_urls" TEXT /* Array of URLs for any media attached to the tweet */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client using the platform */,
  "is_pinned" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the tweet is pinned by the user */,
  "in_reply_to_tweet_id" TEXT /* Reference to the tweet this tweet is a reply to */,
  "in_reply_to_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user this tweet is a reply to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_in_reply_to_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("in_reply_to_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_in_reply_to_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("in_reply_to_tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "screen_name" TEXT /* Screen name (username) of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user's profile */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the user is verified */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "following_count" INTEGER /* Number of users the user is following */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile image */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the user */,
  "account_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Time of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (active, suspended, etc.) */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client using the platform */,
  "is_bot" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the user is a bot */,
  "business_category" TEXT /* Category of business the user is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet the metrics are associated with */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of retweets for the tweet */,
  "fav_count" INTEGER /* Number of favorites (likes) for the tweet */,
  "impression_count" INTEGER /* Number of impressions (views) for the tweet */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Engagement rate of the tweet (calculated as (retweets + favorites) / impressions) */,
  "reply_count" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the tweet */,
  "quote_count" INTEGER /* Number of quotes of the tweet */,
  "click_through_rate" REAL /* Click-through rate for any links in the tweet */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Composite score of the tweet's engagement */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client using the platform */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the metrics were last updated */,
  "last_updated_time" TEXT /* Time the metrics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_metrics_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "hashtag_text" TEXT /* Text of the hashtag */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* Score indicating the popularity of the hashtag */,
  "trend_status" TEXT /* Trend status of the hashtag (trending, not trending) */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client using the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_hashtags" (
  "tweet_hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet-hashtag relationship */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet */,
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hashtag */,
  "occurrence_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the hashtag appears in the tweet */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client using the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_hashtags_hashtag_id FOREIGN KEY ("hashtag_id") REFERENCES hashtags ("hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_hashtags_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mention */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mentioned user */,
  "mention_type" TEXT /* Type of mention (e.g., user, business, event) */,
  "mention_context" TEXT /* Context in which the mention was made */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client using the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "retweets" (
  "retweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each retweet */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the original tweet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who retweeted */,
  "retweet_date" TEXT /* Date the retweet was posted */,
  "retweet_time" TEXT /* Time the retweet was posted */,
  "retweet_type" TEXT /* Type of retweet (e.g., normal, quote retweet) */,
  "retweet_comment" TEXT /* Comment made with the retweet */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client using the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("retweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retweets_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who favorited */,
  "favorite_date" TEXT /* Date the favorite was given */,
  "favorite_time" TEXT /* Time the favorite was given */,
  "favorite_type" TEXT /* Type of favorite (e.g., regular, heart, star) */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client using the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration for which the user has access to the role */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client using the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_mapping_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_mapping_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the tweet */,
  "tweet_text" TEXT /* Text content of the tweet */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the version was updated */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Time the version was updated */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of version (e.g., edit, delete, restore) */,
  "version_comment" TEXT /* Comment made with the version update */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client using the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_versions_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)
